steps.title: Find the scale factor from perimeters
steps.content: For similar triangles, the ratio of corresponding side lengths is the same as the ratio of the perimeters. The table gives perimeter $37$ for triangle $TUV$ and $333$ for triangle $XYZ$, so the scale factor from $TUV$ to $XYZ$ is $$\frac{333}{37}=9.$$

steps.title: Apply scale factor to find XY
steps.content: $TU$ corresponds to $XY$, and $TU=18$. Multiply by the scale factor: $$XY=18\cdot9=162.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The corresponding side length is $162$, so choice D is correct.
